/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/field_data.dir/field_data_test.cpp.o -o ../../bin/field_data  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../../lib/libPrivaSphere-nn.a ../../lib/libPrivaSphere-protocols.a ../../lib/libPrivaSphere-he.a ../../lib/libcheetah-tools.a ../../lib/libcheetah-core.a ../../lib/libcheetah-core-utils.a ../../lib/libnexus-tools.a ../../SEAL/lib/libseal-4.1.a -pthread -lntl -lgmp -lm -lpthread ../../lib/libPrivaSphere-fp.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/local/lib/libgmp.so
